ay.t:
n. 赞成票, 投赞成票者
adv. 永远
interj. (表决时说)赞成
ay.d:
interj. Ah! alas!
adv. Same as Aye.
adv. Yes; yea; -- a word expressing assent, or an affirmative
   answer to a question. It is much used in viva voce voting in
   legislative bodies, etc.
a. Always; ever; continually; for an indefinite time.

aya.t: abbr. 美国AYA项目（Academic Year in America）；急性黄色肝萎缩（Acute Yellow Atrophy Liver）

ayacucho.t: n. 阿亚库乔（秘鲁东南部城市）

ayad.t: n. (Ayad)人名；(阿拉伯)伊亚德；(英)阿亚德；(意)阿亚德

ayah.d: n. (in India) a native nursemaid who looks after children

ayahuasca.t: n. 死藤水(用南美一种藤本植物的根泡制而成有致幻作用的饮料)

ayala index.t: [医] 阿亚拉氏指数, 脑脊液压指数

ayala test.t: [医] 阿亚拉氏试验(检脑脊液)

ayala's index.t: [医] 阿亚拉氏指数(系数)(脑脊液压指数)

ayala's quotient.t: [医] 阿亚拉氏系数(脊液压系数)

ayan.t:
n. 东印度缎木（等于stainwood）
n. (Ayan)人名；(西、土)阿扬

ayana.t: n. (Ayana)人名；(英)艾安娜；(埃塞)阿亚纳

ayapana.t: [医] 三脉佩兰叶(咖啡、茶叶代用品)
ayapana.d: n low spreading tropical American shrub with long slender leaves used to make a mildly stimulating drink resembling tea; sometimes placed in genus Eupatorium

ayapin.t: 三脉泽兰素, 阿雅平, 泽兰内酯

ayat.t: n. (Ayat)人名；(法)阿亚；(阿拉伯、土)阿亚特

ayatollah.t: n. 阿亚图拉（对伊朗等国伊斯兰教什叶派领袖的尊称）
ayatollah.d: n. a high-ranking Shiite religious leader who is regarded as an authority on religious law and its interpretation and who has political power as well

ayatollah khomeini.t: [网络] 霍梅尼；阿亚图拉霍梅尼；领袖霍梅尼

ayatollahs.t: (ayatollah 的复数) n. 阿亚图拉（对伊朗等国伊斯兰教什叶派领袖的尊称）
ayatollahs.d:
plural of ayatollah
n. a high-ranking Shiite religious leader who is regarded as an authority on religious law and its interpretation and who has political power as well

aye.t:
n. 赞成票, 投赞成票者
adv. 永远
interj. (表决时说)赞成
aye.d:
adv. Alt. of Ay
n. An affirmative vote; one who votes in the affirmative; as, "To
   call for the ayes and noes;" "The ayes have it."
a. Alt. of Ay

aye-aye.d: n nocturnal lemur with long bony fingers and rodent-like incisor teeth closely related to the lemurs

ayer's test.t: [医] 艾尔氏试验(检椎管阻滞)

ayer-tobed test.t: [医] 艾-托二氏试验(检横窦血栓形成)

ayerza's disease.t: [医] 阿耶萨氏病(肺细动脉狭窄所致的心脏病)

ayerza's syndrome.t: [医] 阿耶萨氏综合征(气肿、发绀等,见于阻塞性肺动脉内膜炎)

ayes.t: abbr. 汽车青年教育系统（Automotive Youth Educational Systems）

ayfivin.t: 地衣杆菌素, 杆菌肽

ayh.t: abbr. 美国青年招待所联合会（American Youth Hostels）

ayin.t: n. 希伯来文之第十六个字母
ayin.d: n the 16th letter of the Hebrew alphabet

aylen.t: [人名] [英格兰人姓氏] 艾伦 Ayling的变体

ayler.t: [人名] [英格兰人姓氏] 艾勒职业名称，大蒜销售者，来源于古法语及拉丁语，含义是“大蒜”(garlic)

aylward.t: [人名] [英格兰人姓氏] 艾尔沃德来源于日耳曼语人名，含义是“高贵的+警卫”(noble+guard)

aylwin.t: n. (Aylwin)人名；(英)艾尔温；(西)艾尔文

aymara.t: (pl. Aymaras)艾马拉人(南美的一支印第安人)

aymaran.t: a. 艾马拉族的,艾马拉语(族)的

aymaras.t: (Aymara 的复数) (pl. Aymaras)艾马拉人(南美的一支印第安人)

aymard.t: n. (Aymard)人名；(法)艾马尔；(西)艾马德

aynak.t: [地名] [阿富汗、俄罗斯] 艾纳克

ayp.t: [医][=autolyzed yeast protein]自溶性酵母蛋白

ayr.t: n. 埃尔（英国苏格兰港市）
ayr.d: n. a port in southwestern Scotland

ayrault.t: n. (Ayrault)人名；(法)艾罗；(英)艾罗尔特

ayre.t: [人名] [英格兰人、苏格兰人姓氏] 艾尔 Ayer的变体

ayrshire.t: n. 埃尔郡(苏格兰郡名), 艾尔夏牛
ayrshire.d: n. hardy breed of dairy cattle from Ayr, Scotland

ays.t:
(ay 的第三人称 -s形式) n. 赞成票, 投赞成票者
adv. 永远
interj. (表决时说)赞成
ays.d:
-s form of ay
interj. Ah! alas!
adv. Same as Aye.
adv. Yes; yea; -- a word expressing assent, or an affirmative
   answer to a question. It is much used in viva voce voting in
   legislative bodies, etc.
a. Always; ever; continually; for an indefinite time.

ayse.t: 法国产的一种白葡萄酒

aythya ferina.t: [网络] 红头潜鸭；矶雁；二名法

aythya marila.t: [网络] 斑背潜鸭；铃鸭；小潜鸭

aythya valisineria.t: [网络] 帆背潜鸭；帆布背潜鸭；帆布潜鸭

ayton.t: [人名] 艾顿; [地名] [澳大利亚、英国] 艾顿

ayub.t: n. 阿尤布（1958年至1969年任巴基斯坦总统）

ayuntamiento.t: <西>n.(西班牙及前西属殖民地的)市议会,市政厅
ayuntamiento.d:
n. In Spain and Spanish America, a corporation or body
   of magistrates in cities and towns, corresponding to mayor and
   aldermen.

ayurveda.d: n (Sanskrit) an ancient medical treatise summarizing the Hindu art of healing and prolonging life; sometimes regarded as a 5th Veda

ayurvedic.t: n. 阿育吠陀（印度草药按摩, 等于ayurveda）
